metadata.description: AI agent skills for Solana development - DeFi protocols, infrastructure, security, and more

plugins.name: coingecko
plugins.description: CoinGecko Solana API for token prices, DEX pool data, OHLCV charts, trades, and market analytics

plugins.name: ct-alpha
plugins.description: Crypto Twitter intelligence with TweetRank scoring, multi-signal token detection, raid detection, and real-time alpha research via X API

plugins.name: debridge
plugins.description: deBridge Protocol SDK for cross-chain bridges, message passing, and token transfers between Solana and EVM chains

plugins.name: dflow
plugins.description: DFlow trading protocol for spot trading, prediction markets, Swap API, and WebSocket streaming

plugins.name: drift
plugins.description: Drift Protocol SDK for perpetual futures, spot trading, cross-collateral, and vaults

plugins.name: glam
plugins.description: GLAM Protocol for tokenized vaults, DeFi integrations (Jupiter, Drift, Kamino), staking, access control, and asset management on Solana

plugins.name: helius
plugins.description: Build Solana applications with Helius infrastructure including transaction sending (Sender), asset/NFT queries (DAS API), real-time streaming (WebSockets, LaserStream), event pipelines (webhooks), priority fees, and wallet analysis

plugins.name: helius-cli
plugins.description: Command-line tool for AI agents to autonomously sign up for Helius accounts and get API keys without human intervention

plugins.name: helius-dflow
plugins.description: Build Solana trading applications combining DFlow trading APIs with Helius infrastructure for spot swaps, prediction markets, and real-time streaming

plugins.name: helius-phantom
plugins.description: Build frontend Solana applications with Phantom Connect SDK and Helius infrastructure for wallet connection, transaction signing, and secure API proxying

plugins.name: kamino
plugins.description: Kamino Finance for lending, borrowing, liquidity management, leverage trading, and oracle aggregation

plugins.name: light-protocol
plugins.description: Light Protocol for ZK Compression, rent-free compressed tokens, and high-performance token standard

plugins.name: lulo
plugins.description: Lulo lending aggregator for automated yield optimization across Kamino, Drift, MarginFi, and Jupiter

plugins.name: magicblock
plugins.description: MagicBlock Ephemeral Rollups for sub-10ms latency, gasless transactions, and real-time applications

plugins.name: manifest
plugins.description: Manifest DEX for orderbook trading, SDK integration, wrapper and global account flows, reverse orders, and frontend market reads on Solana

plugins.name: marginfi
plugins.description: MarginFi for lending  borrowing, leveraged positions (looping) and flash loans

plugins.name: metengine
plugins.description: Real-time smart money analytics for Polymarket prediction markets, Hyperliquid perpetual futures, and Meteora Solana LP/AMM pools. 63 endpoints. Pay-per-request via x402 on Solana Mainnet USDC. No API keys.

plugins.name: metaplex
plugins.description: Metaplex Protocol for NFTs, Core, Token Metadata, Bubblegum, Candy Machine, and Umi framework

plugins.name: meteora
plugins.description: Meteora DeFi SDK for DLMM, DAMM pools, Dynamic Bonding Curves, Alpha Vaults, and token launches

plugins.name: orca
plugins.description: Orca Whirlpools SDK for concentrated liquidity AMM, swaps, liquidity provision, and position management

plugins.name: phantom-connect
plugins.description: Build wallet-connected Solana apps with Phantom Connect SDK — social login (Google/Apple), transaction signing, token gating, and NFT minting across React, React Native, and Browser SDK

plugins.name: phantom-wallet-mcp
plugins.description: Execute wallet operations via the Phantom MCP server — get addresses, sign transactions, transfer tokens, buy/swap tokens, and sign messages across Solana, Ethereum, Bitcoin, and Sui

plugins.name: pinocchio-development
plugins.description: Pinocchio zero-dependency, zero-copy framework for high-performance Solana programs (88-95% CU reduction)

plugins.name: pumpfun
plugins.description: PumpFun Protocol for token launches, bonding curves, and PumpSwap AMM integration

plugins.name: pyth
plugins.description: Pyth Network oracle for real-time price feeds, confidence intervals, and EMA prices

plugins.name: quicknode
plugins.description: Quicknode RPC infrastructure, DAS API, Yellowstone gRPC streaming, Streams, Webhooks, Priority Fees, Metis Jupiter Swap, and IPFS for Solana (80+ chains supported)

plugins.name: ranger-finance
plugins.description: Ranger Finance perps aggregator for smart order routing across Drift, Flash, Adrena, and Jupiter

plugins.name: raydium
plugins.description: Raydium Protocol for AMM pools, CLMM, CPMM, LaunchLab token launches, and liquidity infrastructure

plugins.name: sanctum
plugins.description: Sanctum SDK for liquid staking, LST swaps, Infinity pool, and 1,361+ liquid staking tokens

plugins.name: solana-agent-kit
plugins.description: Build AI agents that execute 60+ Solana blockchain operations with LangChain, Vercel AI, and MCP support

plugins.name: solana-kit
plugins.description: Modern tree-shakeable JavaScript SDK from Anza with zero dependencies and full TypeScript support

plugins.name: solana-kit-migration

plugins.name: svm
plugins.description: Explore Solana's architecture and protocol internals including the SVM execution engine, account model, consensus, transactions, and validator economics

plugins.name: squads

plugins.name: surfpool
